description: A specialized symposium on static analysis techniques, covering abstract interpretation, program verification, and data flow analysis. SAS provides the theoretical foundation for program analysis tools and is highly regarded in the formal methods and PL communities. Though small, it concentrates deeply focused research in the field.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Relating Distances and Abstractions: An Abstract Interpretation Perspective

descriptionKo: 정적 분석 기법에 특화된 학회로, 추상 해석, 프로그램 검증, 데이터 흐름 분석 등을 다룹니다. 프로그램 분석 도구의 이론적 기반을 제공하는 핵심 학회이며, 형식 기법과 PL 커뮤니티에서 높이 평가받습니다. 규모는 작지만 분야의 깊이 있는 연구가 집중되는 학회입니다.
descriptionEn: A specialized symposium on static analysis techniques, covering abstract interpretation, program verification, and data flow analysis. SAS provides the theoretical foundation for program analysis tools and is highly regarded in the formal methods and PL communities. Though small, it concentrates deeply focused research in the field.
